name: Paris, France
date_str: [1114] Sic res occultas colit officiosa voluntas, Huic ut majorem pariat sine voce favorem Clamet lingua tamen (( Tibi sit, pia donna, beamen; Nosque tuum mundas faciat tibi dogma secundas. Versus cujusdam neptis suae. 5 Post obitum matri propre sis, reverenda Maria. Nomine Mathildi pia sis; benedicta Maria. Hanc bene defendas; fortis virtute Maria. Ne tenebras timeat, te praeduce; clara Maria . Non hostis noceat, te visa, virgo Maria. 10 Insidians taceat, te judice; domna Maria. Et fraudes reprimat, te convincente; Maria. Mox procul aufugiat, bona, te terrente, Maria. Hec eat in requiem, te dante; colenda Maria. Jungatur sanctis; te, justa, jubente, Maria. 15 Feliciter vivat, te, sancta, favente, Maria. Corregnetque Deo, te presule, digna Maria. Orate n., Alvena ( abbatissa, Beatrice (2) abbatissa, Mathilde priore; Emma P. (a) Oswena   monacha, Formosa   monacha, Albreda priore; Godesteva   monacha 20 monacha; Ulburga monacha, Alditha monacha, Vulvida monacha; Bristeva mona- cha, Leveva monacha, Ediva monacha, Lewena monacha; Cecilia monacha, Asce- lina monacha, Orengia monacha, Alveva monacha; Ascelina monacha; Gisla mona- cha, Lescelina monacha; Dina monacha, Ulburge monacha; Mathilde monacha, Mathilde, Benedicta monacha; Susanna laica ceterisque amicis nostris. 25 Istis solamen tribuat Deus omnibus. Amen.
description: Origin: 12 [11] S.d.- Wherwell, Holy Cross; S. Peter T San...
